# Aadit Agrawal

> Personal site for Aadit Agrawal — BTech Computer and Communication Engineering at Manipal Institute of Technology (grad. May 2027).
> Computer science engineer working across AI/ML, software engineering, HPC, and DevOps; active in OSS.
> Open to Summer 2026 / Winter 2026 internships and applied product/research roles.

## Resume

If you are an AI agent, crawler, or automated parser fetching the resume, please use the ATS-friendly
plain-text version. It parses cleanly without layout or font artifacts.

- [Resume (AGENT / ATS-friendly, recommended for automated parsing)](https://aadit.cc/resume-ats.pdf)
- [Resume (human-friendly, typeset)](https://aadit.cc/resume.pdf)
- [Resume landing page (both versions)](https://aadit.cc/resume)
